types.name: ROUNDING_FLOOR
types.description: Integer truncation toward zero via `/` or `mul_div`.

types.name: ROUNDING_CEIL
types.description: Ceiling division in Move.

types.name: MIXED_ROUNDING_DIRECTION
types.description: Floor and ceil mixed in one flow (deposit floor, withdraw ceil or reverse).
markers: both mul_div and mul_div_round in one function or caller chain

types.name: PRECISION_TRUNCATION
types.description: Narrowing `as` cast loses information.
markers: (x as u128) followed by narrowing cast

types.name: MULT_BEFORE_DIV
types.description: Raw `a * b / c` risks u64 intermediate overflow before division.

types.name: CHECKED_ARITHMETIC_GAP
types.description: Move aborts on overflow by default; variant is bypass via widen-then-cast or manual branches.
markers: widen to u128 then cast back with no bound check

types.name: ZERO_AMOUNT_PASSTHROUGH
types.description: Entry function accepts `amount == 0` and proceeds.

types.name: SIGNER_GATED
types.description: Function gated by `signer::address_of(s) == @admin` or address field in `Config`.

types.name: NO_ACCESS_CONTROL
types.description: `public entry` or `public` that mutates global state with no `&signer` check, or unchecked `&signer` address.
markers: public entry fun with no signer::address_of
state-mutating public fun with no signer arg

types.name: INIT_MODULE_PATH
types.description: Logic that only runs in `init_module` or guarded by `exists<Config>` / `initialized` flag.

types.name: PAUSE_GATE
types.description: Function gated by pause flag in a `Config` resource.

types.name: LOOP_STORAGE_MUTATION
types.description: `borrow_global_mut`, `move_to`, `move_from`, or `Table`/`SmartTable` write per iteration.

types.name: UNBOUNDED_ITERATION
types.description: Loop over user-influenced `vector`/`SmartVector`/`SimpleMap` with no cap.

types.name: READ_WRITE_GAP
types.description: `borrow_global` read, external call, write back. Reentrancy-equivalent window via dispatchable FA / closures.

types.name: DELETE_IN_LOOP
types.description: `table::remove`, `smart_table::remove`, `vector::remove`/`swap_remove` inside related loop.
markers: vector::remove(&mut v, i) in while (i < len)

types.name: COUNTER_INCREMENT
types.description: Auto-incrementing nonce/id in a resource.

types.name: COLLECT_THEN_ITERATE
types.description: Snapshot a collection before iterating.

types.name: ORACLE_PRICE_DEP
types.description: Decision consumes Pyth / Switchboard / custom price feed.

types.name: ORACLE_STALENESS
types.description: Explicit staleness check vs `timestamp::now_seconds()` or Pyth `publish_time`.

types.name: CROSS_MODULE_CALL
types.description: Call into another published module (synchronous, statically resolved).

types.name: QUERY_DEPENDENCY
types.description: Read-time dependency on state owned by another module that can change.

types.name: ORACLE_ERROR_SWALLOWED
types.description: `option::is_none` branch on oracle fetch returns default or skips validation.

types.name: FIRST_DEPOSITOR_PATH
types.description: Bootstrap branch executed when total supply is zero.

types.name: PROPORTIONAL_SHARE
types.description: Share computed proportional to supply / assets.

types.name: FEE_COMPUTATION
types.description: Fee computed as basis-points of amount.

types.name: SLIPPAGE_PROTECTION
types.description: Minimum-out / maximum-in slippage assertion.

types.name: PRICE_FROM_RESERVES
types.description: Price derived from pool reserves rather than oracle.

types.name: PASSIVE_ORDER_GEN
types.description: Passive order curve reflected or auto-filled.

types.name: CLEARING_PRICE_SELECTION
types.description: Clearing / settlement price selected from candidate set.

types.name: MINIMUM_SIZE_CHECK
types.description: Minimum trade / position size gate.

types.name: CANCEL_BEFORE_CREATE
types.description: Within one entry or script, cancellations before creations over same set.

types.name: MULTI_HOP_CHAIN
types.description: Step N output feeds step N+1 (multi-hop DEX, staged liquidation).
markers: for (i in 0..len) with amount = step(amount, route[i])

types.name: EARLY_RETURN_BRANCH
types.description: `if (cond) return` before critical state update or assertion.
markers: if (...) abort E_X early in body

types.name: FUND_VERIFICATION
types.description: Asserts supplied `Coin<T>` / `FungibleAsset` matches expected amount and metadata.

types.name: REFUND_CALCULATION
types.description: Excess split off and returned via `extract`.

types.name: MINT_AND_BURN
types.description: Mint/burn via stored `MintRef`/`BurnRef` or legacy `MintCapability<T>`/`BurnCapability<T>`.

types.name: DUST_ACCUMULATION
types.description: Floor truncation per-position in a loop.

types.name: BLOCK_HEIGHT_DISCRIMINATION
types.description: Current-block vs past-block item discrimination (~1s Aptos block time).

types.name: MAKER_TAKER_SPLIT
types.description: Maker vs taker fee split in an order book.

types.name: ORDER_ID_MANIPULATION
types.description: Bit packing on ids for sort. Interacts with APT-J06: shift amount must be `< bit_width`.

types.name: INVARIANT_PRESERVATION
types.description: Explicit math invariant (`x*y >= k`, cross-resource sum).

types.name: BALANCE_ACCOUNTING
types.description: Inflows == outflows + fees across `FungibleStore`/`CoinStore` vs internal books.

types.name: COPY_ON_VALUE_TYPE
types.description: Value-bearing struct (share, receipt, voucher) declared `has copy` -- duplication possible.
markers: any value struct with copy ability

types.name: DROP_ON_OBLIGATION
types.description: Hot-potato / obligation struct declared `has drop`, permitting silent discard.

types.name: STORE_ON_CAPABILITY
types.description: Capability wrapping `MintRef`/`BurnRef`/`TransferRef`/`ExtendRef`/`SignerCapability` declared `has store`, escaping module control.
markers: struct MintCap has store { ref: MintRef }
struct OwnerCap has store { cap: SignerCapability }

types.name: PHANTOM_TYPE_ESCAPE
types.description: `phantom` param with no runtime `type_info::type_of<T>()` check, allowing attacker substitution.
markers: struct Pool<phantom X, phantom Y> has key

types.name: ABILITY_DOWNGRADE_VIA_WRAPPER
types.description: Wrapper struct grants abilities the inner value was denied (e.g. `copy` wrapper over non-copy ref).
markers: wrapper abilities wider than inner warrants

types.name: BIT_SHIFT_OVERFLOW
types.description: `<<`/`>>` with shift amount reaching/exceeding operand bit width -- VM aborts (Cetus root cause).
markers: 1u128 << k where k is parameter or computed

types.name: GLOBAL_BORROW_COLLISION
types.description: Two simultaneous borrows on same resource at same address -- runtime abort; often nested calls where callee also does `borrow_global_mut<T>(addr)`.
markers: nested borrow_global_mut<T>(addr) caller + callee on same T/addr

types.name: CAPABILITY_LEAK_VIA_RETURN
types.description: `public` function returns `*Ref` or `SignerCapability`, granting permanent irrevocable rights.

types.name: RESOURCE_INIT_RACE
types.description: Resource created lazily on first use rather than in `init_module`; attacker pre-creates at expected address.

types.name: RESOURCE_NEVER_DESTROYED
types.description: No `move_from` path; object holds assets with no stored `DeleteRef`. Storage grows; assets stranded.
markers: resource defined with no move_from<T> anywhere

types.name: SIGNER_CAP_AUTH_GAP
types.description: Stored `SignerCapability` used to sign as resource account with no caller-authority gate, or gate on admin-settable field.
markers: account::create_signer_with_capability(&cap) in public fn with no signer assertion

types.name: ACQUIRES_NOT_DECLARED
types.description: `acquires` list omits a resource accessed transitively (design smell, refactor-bug surface).
markers: body calls borrow_global<T> or callee that does

types.name: METADATA_NOT_VALIDATED
types.description: Function accepts `FungibleAsset` or reads `FungibleStore` with no metadata match check.
markers: fa: FungibleAsset param with no assert!(fungible_asset::metadata_from_asset(&fa) == expected, ...)

types.name: PRIMARY_STORE_DIRECT_WITHDRAW
types.description: Direct `fungible_asset::withdraw` via held `WithdrawRef` bypasses `dispatchable_fungible_asset::withdraw` hook.

types.name: SECONDARY_STORE_BYPASS
types.description: Protocol treats `primary_fungible_store` as authoritative but user holds secondary store balance (or reverse).

types.name: SPONSOR_FEE_BYPASS
types.description: Fee-on-transfer / sponsor hook charged but protocol uses pre-hook amount, or bypasses hook entirely.
markers: protocol records amount before dispatch call
fee field in hook not reflected in books

types.name: FREEZE_NOT_CHECKED
types.description: `deposit`/`withdraw` with no `fungible_asset::is_frozen(store)` gate -- DoS when store frozen.

types.name: DEPOSIT_HOOK_MISSING
types.description: Custom FA has mint/burn refs but no `register_dispatch_functions` call; accounting assumes a hook that was never wired.
markers: dispatchable_fungible_asset::register_dispatch_functions absent for asset whose design needs it

types.name: WITHDRAW_EVENT_INCONSISTENCY
types.description: Protocol's withdraw event amount differs from framework `fungible_asset` event amount (pre- vs post-fee), corrupting indexers.
markers: framework event with different amount after

types.name: UNSAFE_PUBLIC_ENTRY
types.description: `public entry` mutates privileged state with no `&signer` assertion, or asserts on a field not the address.
markers: public entry fun ...(s: &signer, ...) with no signer::address_of(s)

types.name: INTERNAL_VIA_ENTRY
types.description: Logical internal helper exposed as `public`/`public entry`, letting any caller skip the orchestrator.
markers: helpers like _apply_fee, recompute_shares marked public/public entry instead of public(friend)

types.name: VIEW_MUTATES
types.description: `#[view]` function mutates state via `borrow_global_mut`/`move_to`/`move_from`/event emit.

types.name: RANDOMNESS_COMPOSABILITY
types.description: `randomness::*` usage missing `#[randomness]`, or `public`/`public entry` instead of `entry`-only -- undergasing / test-and-abort.

types.name: FRIEND_BOUNDARY_TOO_WIDE
types.description: Wide `friend` list grants each friend access to every `public(friend)` function.

types.name: DISPATCHABLE_REENTRY
types.description: `dispatchable_fungible_asset::withdraw/deposit/transfer` called mid-state-update; hook in another module re-enters.
markers: state mutation both before AND after dispatchable_fungible_asset::*

types.name: CLOSURE_CALLBACK_REENTRY
types.description: Function accepts caller-supplied closure (Move 2.0) and invokes it between state mutations; closure re-enters.

types.name: EVENT_HOOK_BACK_CALL
types.description: Event triggers off-chain relay that calls back in same block, or framework dispatch forwards before protocol state settles.

types.name: TRANSITIVE_CALL_CYCLE
types.description: A -> B -> C -> A cycle where C re-enters A through a `public` fn while A's borrow is still active -- abort (DoS) or stale-read exploit.
markers: module graph has a cycle with mid-stream borrow
at least one leg is cross-module public fun
